So are we waiting until all the technology in Snow Crash actually exists before making it a movie or what?

also you can hack algorithms outside of your control by controlling the known inputs, at least given their current complexity, and probably forever based on my lifetime experience of humans and computers

we keep forgetting we are talking about the equivalent of an extraordinarily intelligent and persistent person raised in complete darkness who has only ever known the things we have chosen to show them, that's a lot more pitiful than a god
the secret to the AI age is not the algorithms but the corpora

btw quick life hack to feel super productive is to just fly a few timezones up every once in a while, you wake up "super early" and have a very productive day like an overachiever – convinced californians have a warped sense of new york personalities due to this

i have completely ruined my sleep schedule. During my trip in CA I started a new habit where I woke up at 5:30am (because it's 8:30 EST) but now that I am back in NY I still wake up at 5:30 ?? makes no sense
i'm a rule lover who loves a rule breaker, can't get much more american than that

Which reminds me of the contemporary average white man, who says “this isn’t racist!” or “I am not a racist!” when really you just have to not ignore the actual human POC in your life and just listen to what they have to say and it clears up pretty quickly

Which reminds me of the MeToo movement and all these men who wonder “but can I do anything anymore? What is even reasonable behavior in 2020” which can be easily rectified by simply having a few conversations with the actual human women in your life

Which reminds me a lot of product design, where people work on a great idea and ask me to build it, and I go “sounds great. Have you talked to any actual human users what they think?” and they haven’t and then we do some user testing

I really like advice columns because 70% of the time the answer to the inquiry is “hey here is my opinion, but have you considered talking to or asking the actual human people around you what they think?”
